description: Articles matching these keywords (case-insensitive) in the title are excluded from the podcast. Includes political content and all sports coverage — even local sports stories are excluded per editorial policy.

trusted_senders.description: Emails from these addresses bypass theme matching and are queued as type 'test' for pipeline verification. They are never used in podcast generation.

email_sender_blocklist.description: Emails from these sender domains or matching these from-address patterns are rejected at ingest, regardless of keyword score.
